title: The Art of the Deal -- Proposals & Counteroffers
subtitle: Negotiate terms, make offers and counteroffers
menu_desc: Second conditional & negotiation language -- offers, counteroffers, concessions
welcome: This lesson you learn to NEGOTIATE in English: make an offer, respond to a counteroffer, use leverage, make concessions, and meet halfway -- arguing hypotheticals with the second conditional (if we lowered X, we would get Y).
